description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The exterior features a mix of light-colored plaster and brown brickwork, with large floor-to-ceiling windows on the ground floor and smaller windows on the upper level. The property includes a paved driveway with a parked car, a landscaped yard with grass, shrubs, and a prominent tree, as well as a unique gazebo-like structure in the garden. The rooftop has an open terrace with outdoor furniture and potted plants, providing additional living space. The house is surrounded by a tiled walkway and is set within a neatly maintained urban lot.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a rooftop terrace, and landscaped yard featuring a gazebo and driveway.
description_view_0: Side view showing the brick facade, large ground-floor window, driveway with car, and part of the rooftop terrace.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, large windows, green lawn, and the gazebo structure under a large tree.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open terrace, multiple windows, and the driveway with car and surrounding greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the main entrance, car on the driveway, and a clear view of the upper terrace and tree.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, paved approach, and minimal overhang, flanked by large windows and landscaping.
